body:
## Required Task Fields

```yaml
lane: validation_tooling
intelligence_level: frontier
reason: "Fixture includes complete compact scope-lock task fields."
durable_source_of_truth: "GitHub issue #227"
objective: "Generate a deterministic compact governance scope lock."
allowed_paths:
  - scripts/asgk.py
  - examples/compact_governance/**
  - examples/negative/compact_governance/**
expected_output:
  - scope lock JSON
plan:
  - add command
checklist:
  - command passes
acceptance_sheet:
  - scope hash stable
non_goals:
  - no default compact governance
stop_conditions:
  - default governance behavior would change
rollback_expectations:
  - revert PR
```
